name: Lahontan Gold Corp.
description: Lahontan Gold Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the discovery and development of gold and silver resources in the prolific Walker Lane trend of Nevada. The company's flagship project is the Santa Fe Mine, a past-producing open-pit gold and silver mine with significant exploration potential. Lahontan Gold aims to create shareholder value by utilizing modern exploration techniques to expand known mineralization and identify new targets within its extensive land package in one of the world's premier mining jurisdictions.
